title: HPE security advisory (AV26-571)
description: On June 9, 2026, HPE published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: HPE Aruba Networking Management Software (Airwave)  version 8.3.0.6 and prior
HPE Aruba Networking Private 5G Management Dashboard  all versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
